title: Human Resource Executive
description:
Position Overview

The Human Resource Executive will play a key role in managing HR operations, supporting employee engagement, and ensuring smooth execution of HR policies and practices. This role also includes planning and organizing internal company events to foster a positive workplace culture and employee satisfaction.


Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in full-cycle recruitment including job posting, screening, interviewing, and coordinating offers.
  • Prepare onboarding materials and ensure a smooth orientation process for new hires.
  • Maintain accurate and up-to-date employee records and databases.
  • Serve as a point of contact for employee inquiries and concerns, ensuring fair and timely resolution.
  • Support the implementation of employee engagement initiatives, recognition programs, and satisfaction surveys.
  • Foster positive relationships between management and staff to maintain a productive work environment.
  • Maintain and update HR policies, procedures, and employee handbooks.
  • Assist in payroll processing and attendance management.
  • Ensure compliance with labor laws, company policies, and regulatory requirements.


Requirements

  • Diploma or bachelor’s degree in human resources, Business Administration, or a related field.
  • 2–4 years of experience in HR operations, recruitment, or employee engagement.
  • Strong organizational and communication skills.
  • Excellent interpersonal and problem-solving abilities.
  • Proficiency in HR software (e.g., HRIS) like InfoTech
  • Experience in event planning or coordination is an added advantage.


What We Offer

  • Competitive salary with performance incentives.
  • Stable career with opportunities for learning and growth.
  • Supportive and collaborative work environment.
  • Exposure to a broad range of industries and customers.


How to Apply

Interested candidates are invited to submit their CV with details of their experience, current & expected salary and earliest availability.

postedCompany.description:
Established in 1982, Allinton Engineering & Trading Pte Ltd plays a dynamic role as the one stop solution provider in the supply of quality hardware tools and equipment to local and overseas customers. 


We cater to a wide spectrum of markets such as Marine & Offshore, Oil & Gas, Shipyards, Construction, Petrochemical and Manufacturing. As a rapidly expanding business, we continually seek to diverse our services into more sectors. 


To provide customers with the best quality products, we carry an extensive and comprehensive range of equipment from renowned brands such as AET, Fastcut & Kanazawa, etc.


Allinton prides herself on the company culture of progressive learning and development. We strive to hire the brightest and most curious minds. We believe that with the right mindset and attitude, opportunities are present for all to chart your own path by owning your development, your career, and your future.
postedCompany.name: ALLINTON ENGINEERING & TRADING PTE. LTD.
